Find out what is like to live in France, get to know its regions, and feel the true taste of France.

programme.title: Saraswati Chandra
programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.title: Ye Hai Mohabbatein
programme.desc: A Tamil dentist and Punjabi businessman fall in love, navigating family expectations, parenting, and emotional complexities across cultures.

programme.title: E12 - World Remix
programme.desc: In this special episode, we take you around the world for a look at never-before-seen shenanigans of the BMX duo, and you won’t believe some of the activities that didn’t make the previous episodes. Rooftop and Catfish hatch crocodiles, get maced in a gas chamber, attempt to grow Catfish a few inches, race tuk tuk carts in Thailand, and so much more. They try out a Romanian banya sauna, ride a human run wooden Ferris wheel, try the explosive Columbian game tejo, and last but not least neuter a horse. Enjoy this action packed special of even crazier activities.

programme.title: E5 - Rusty Crayfish
programme.desc: In the land of ten thousand lakes, Leech Lake stands out, because it's the third largest lake located entirely within the state of Minnesota. Known as a destination for walleye, pike and muskie fishing, Leech Lake attracts fishermen from all over the Midwest... and that's where the trouble began. Fishermen from the Ohio River Basin brought rusty crawfish up to Leech Lake as bait... and when done fishing, they released them, inadvertently giving the rusty crayfish a new home. Now, the rustys are pushing out the native crayfish, and destroying the weed beds the muskie, pike and walleye depend on. Fishing guide Phil Bauerly sees the destruction daily. To combat the rustys, Phil regularly throws lakeside crayfish boils for family and friends... and Yia just received his invitation to join.

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: E7 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E6 - Turf Games
programme.desc: As the team completes the three brutal events scheduled in 48 hours, Adam plans a surprise return to the East Coast with a Turf Games event in Sydney.

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: E7 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: Sports[Live]
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Les unes de la presse[Live]
programme.desc: Une revue des grands titres, éditos, photos et dessins du jour issus de la presse française et internationale. Les chroniqueurs passent en revue les titres les plus marquants.

programme.title: L'actu 360 : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un tour complet de l'actualité du jour, qui présente les faits essentiels en France et dans le monde. Grâce à des analyses claires et des clés de compréhension, ce programme permet de mieux saisir les enjeux politiques, économiques et sociaux qui marquent le monde contemporain et d'en suivre les évolutions principales.

programme.title: L'instant mobile
programme.desc: Une émission d'information au format court qui traite des sujets les plus captivants venus du monde entier. À travers des reportages dynamiques et un regard incisif, elle propose un condensé de l'actualité internationale pour rester informé rapidement et efficacement.

programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Le débat de parlons-en[Live]
programme.desc: Prendre le temps de décrypter et de comprendre le monde, en donnant la parole à celles et ceux qui le font tourner, c'est l'objectif des débats de Parlons-en'.'

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E48
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: Between Home And Hate - Undercover Among Far-Right Women
programme.desc: Right-wing extremist parties are much less popular among women than men. In Germany, one women's organization aims to change that. It offers harmless lifestyle tips alongside xenophobic messaging.

programme.title: Can India's King Of Fruits Conquer Europe?
programme.desc: Air freight, strict regulations and prices of up to E22 per kilo: Indian traders are testing whether mangoes can work as a niche product in Europe. Plus: Pakistan's solar boom.

programme.title: E2 - 昆韻幽香 梅開兩代
programme.desc: 聚焦中國優秀文化傳統，講述文化名家和文藝人才的故事及師徒傳習技藝的過程，記錄與展現“名師帶徒”計畫創作成果。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E59
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E7 - 05後大學生已經出來求職了
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E3 - 迎來首個公休日
programme.desc: 五位全新的音樂人梁龍、胡夏、白舉綱、希林娜依·高、黃子弘凡以歌手形象反轉擔任Live House工作人員，以全新的姿態再度開啟這趟音樂旅程。同時，帶著全新口號「總有快樂發聲」，一起共同見證更多生活中的美好與驚喜。

programme.title: E2 - Returning With Glory II
programme.desc: Fearing a large-scale attack by Netherworld of the Deva, the Japanese government is willing to negotiate with MAR.

programme.title: E3 - Returning With Glory III
programme.desc: The villagers come to a new place where they can reunite with Avrora. Mogwai asks them to protect a sealing system.

programme.title: E11 - Sorcery And Magic
programme.desc: A demon, Ainswelf, appears and kills many soldiers. He calls Shion a descendant of Legreh and calls his magic 'sorcery'.

programme.title: E12 - Who Am I Really?
programme.desc: Shion realises he has gained an enormous amount of magic power, so he rushes to Marie's side to treat her disease.

programme.title: E11 - Miranda Lotto's Feelings
programme.desc: Allen is horrified that Road is a human working with the Akuma. Road attempts to kill Miranda, but fails as Allen rescues Miranda.

programme.title: E12 - And Snow Falls Over The Town
programme.desc: Road orders an Akuma to self-destruct, and Allen fails to exorcise it before it explodes. Allen is unable to kill Road, and she leaves the dimension.

programme.title: E54
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E6 - Blooming Among The Stars
programme.desc: Swiss artists Nicolas and Julie, masters of bright, shimmering colors, aim to brighten up cities, squares, and the world through joyful installations, paintings, murals, and sculptures. Their vibrant world brings to life the dream of a kinder, more colorful future.

programme.title: E114
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.desc: Daddy Pig receives a letter saying he must go away on business to test some very important concrete!

programme.title: E738 - Once Upon A Time
programme.desc: Peppa and family go on a walk through the forests where they meet all their favourite fairytale characters.

programme.title: E230 - Cuckoo Clock
programme.desc: Daddy Pig winds up the old cuckoo clock. When a wooden cuckoo pops out singing “Cuckoo!”, Peppa thinks it is very funny, but George has missed the whole thing. George does not want to miss the cuckoo again but the cuckoo only pops out once an hour.

programme.desc: Tim & Kai have a rare disagreement, and each try to find a new best friend.

programme.title: E833 - Made Up Musical Instruments

programme.title: E836 - Butterflies
programme.desc: Doctor Hamster comes to school to talk about butterflies. The children paint caterpillars, make butterfly wings and even dance the life cycle of a butterfly.

programme.title: E119 - We Promise, Papa
programme.desc: When he sees the barbababies wasting water, Barbapapa takes them aside to tell them a funny story.

programme.title: E703 - The Super Skateboard
programme.desc: It's Grammy's birthday but Crusher doesn't have enough money for a special gift! So, Blaze and AJ help him do different jobs and earn the money for Grammy's present. But, they have to hurry so they can be back in time for Grammy's birthday party!

programme.title: E110 - Surf / Spaceship / Pizza
programme.desc: Tim and Kai go crater surfing and attempt a cool new trick. // Tim and Kai attempt to rebuild Dad's childhood spaceship. // Tim tries to rid the house of a troublesome space bug.

programme.title: E741 - Stamps
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig is showing Peppa and George his extensive stamp collection, which inspires them to send a postcard of their own!

programme.title: E203 - The Crew Builds A Mini Golf Course/The Crew Builds A Butterfly Garden
programme.desc: When a family of bunnies hops onto the soccer field, Rubble & Crew use their skills to build a new sport... Bunny Ball! // After the pups discover a new kind of butterfly, it flutters away! Will a giant butterfly garden help bring it back?

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: E46
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E266 - Buktu The Future/High Stress Express/Half-Sies/Xingo's Back/Gentle Ben
programme.desc: After Tim Buktu's live stream is mysteriously cut short, Team Tennyson must attempt a rescue mission and break inside the highly confidential Area 55 in order to save him.

programme.title: E432 - Lamput Docs And Robot/The Docs Express/Clowning Around
programme.desc: Lamput is stuck in the lab with a dangerous robot on the loose! It’s up to the combined effort of the two Docs and the entire Lab team to save him before it is too late.

programme.title: E248 - Forest Pirates/Snot And Tears/Tv Knight 5/Campfire!/The Metric System Vs. Freedom
programme.desc: The Titans are at Super Hero Summer Camp for the week and they may need to add another teammate to win the big canoe race.

programme.title: E7 - Fun At The Museum/Bouncy Bridge Rhapsody
programme.desc: Shiro heads to a museum where he finds a dinosaur fossil! He can't find the Bobobobobone as there are too many bones. Will Shiro be able to get the Bobobobobone without being caught?

programme.title: E4 - Fix That Tape/Skips' Luau
programme.desc: A broken VHS tape needs to be fixed.

programme.title: E4 - A. The Laziest/The Ghost
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin challenge Dad to a 'lazy-off.'

programme.title: E435 - A Case Of Mistaken Identity/Arctic Adventure/Giant Lamput
programme.desc: It's a perfect evening. Droopy has finished his day at work and Thief has successfully completed his art heist. But an accident with Lamput causes their briefcases to be swapped.

programme.title: E408 - Favorite Animated Show Nominee
programme.desc: /Robin finds it suspicious that the Titans are always nominated for an award but never win and is determined to find out why.

programme.title: E4 - Fix That Tape/Skips' Luau
programme.desc: A broken VHS tape needs to be fixed.

programme.title: E46 - B. The Allergy/The Mothers/The Password/The Procrastinators/The Shell
programme.desc: Gumball needs to find a cure for Darwin's allergy before he sneezes Elmore off the map. Darwin starts sneezing repeatedly and it seems he can't stop.

programme.desc: Lamput is stuck in the lab with a dangerous robot on the loose! It’s up to the combined effort of the two Docs and the entire Lab team to save him before it is too late.

E1 - Carnivores of the Coral Garden
programme.desc: The seas are alive with carnivores. Meet the sharks and rays who patrol the coral reefs, hunting down their prey. Learn about toxic fish who disguise themselves to ambush the unwary, and armoured predators who devour vulnerable targets.

programme.title: E1 - Carnivores of the Coral Garden
programme.desc: The seas are alive with carnivores. Meet the sharks and rays who patrol the coral reefs, hunting down their prey. Learn about toxic fish who disguise themselves to ambush the unwary, and armoured predators who devour vulnerable targets.

programme.title: E3 - Bahamas Hollywood Wrecks
programme.desc: The Bahamas is known as the “underwater movie capital of the world”. Hollywood has been coming here for decades, making epic movies and TV shows in its crystal clear waters, leaving behind a host of cinematic shipwrecks.

programme.title: E1 - Carnivores of the Coral Garden
programme.desc: The seas are alive with carnivores. Meet the sharks and rays who patrol the coral reefs, hunting down their prey. Learn about toxic fish who disguise themselves to ambush the unwary, and armoured predators who devour vulnerable targets.

programme.title: E3 - Bahamas Hollywood Wrecks
programme.desc: The Bahamas is known as the “underwater movie capital of the world”. Hollywood has been coming here for decades, making epic movies and TV shows in its crystal clear waters, leaving behind a host of cinematic shipwrecks.

programme.title: E2 - Otago Peninsula/ Muaupoko
programme.desc: Set sail for New Zealand’s Otago Peninsula, a breeding refuge for endangered seabirds and marine mammals. Watch as sea lions, albatrosses, red-billed gulls, white-fronted terns, and fairy prions find mates, then nurture the next generation.

programme.title: E3 - Bahamas Hollywood Wrecks
programme.desc: The Bahamas is known as the “underwater movie capital of the world”. Hollywood has been coming here for decades, making epic movies and TV shows in its crystal clear waters, leaving behind a host of cinematic shipwrecks.

programme.title: E1 - Carnivores of the Coral Garden
programme.desc: The seas are alive with carnivores. Meet the sharks and rays who patrol the coral reefs, hunting down their prey. Learn about toxic fish who disguise themselves to ambush the unwary, and armoured predators who devour vulnerable targets.

programme.title: E3 - Stork Pack in Trouble
programme.desc: Agonize over a lost Stork pack puppy, and tussle with Manzi pups who are sorting their place in the hierarchy, figuring out noisy-neighbor friends and foes. Hop on a search mission with Julz for the missing Kakuli pack in the desolate Badlands.

programme.title: E1 - First Steps
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: E2 - Back to the Wild
programme.desc: Balance the pain of goodbyes with hope for the future as a generation of rescued elephants are finally released. Welcome new additions to the Reteti family, including a baby elephant rescued from a watering hole and a traumatized zebra named Kisima.

programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: E3 - Bahamas Hollywood Wrecks
programme.desc: The Bahamas is known as the “underwater movie capital of the world”. Hollywood has been coming here for decades, making epic movies and TV shows in its crystal clear waters, leaving behind a host of cinematic shipwrecks.

programme.title: E1 - Carnivores of the Coral Garden
programme.desc: The seas are alive with carnivores. Meet the sharks and rays who patrol the coral reefs, hunting down their prey. Learn about toxic fish who disguise themselves to ambush the unwary, and armoured predators who devour vulnerable targets.

programme.title: Midnight Fly
programme.desc: Michele takes off for Europe to contemplate her inevitable divorce. She meets the beautiful Miki, a Japanese model who tries to end a relationship with a married man. There is nothing like love trouble to foster a quick bond and the women become close friends. However, during an evening of drunken revelry, Miki discloses by accident that she is the other woman of Michele's husband...

programme.title: You Are My Destiny
programme.desc: A beautiful young heiress of a Japanese real estate billionaire escapes the confines of her guardian & bodyguard only to hook-up with a wacky group of musicians known as “The Loosers” with Hong Kong prop idol Alan Tam as the leader of the pack...

programme.title: Needing You
programme.desc: Kinki is transferred to Andy's division due to 'office politics'. Rumors have it that Andy is womanizer and Kinki is unwilling to work with him! However, life is mysterious...

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Retrieve The Heartbeat
programme.desc: The film “Vital Signs” tells the story of three paramedics who are enthusiastic about their work but at the crossroads facing mounting pressure everyday - while they rescue others' lives, they release themselves through different cases. In this interview, the main cast Louis Koo, Neo Yau and Poon Chan Leung talk about their roles of playing as the paramedic and stories from the film set. Koo reveals that although there wasn't much communication amongst the actors before camera rolling, the chemistry was just great after shout “Action”. Poon also recalls the scene that had left lingering fear in him. Let's follow them to find out more behind-the-scene stories.

programme.title: Serie A Women 25/26 E22 -Napoli v Milan
Malaysian NSL '26 E1 -Terengganu Marvels v Perak Phoe
Serie A Women 25/26 E22 -Napoli v Milan
Malaysian NSL '26 E1 -Terengganu Marvels v Perak Phoe
MP Series '25 E12 -Cape to Cape '25 H/L
MP Series '25 E12 -Cape to Cape '25 H/L
E27
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E27

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: It's Showtime Live[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E6 - Calm Songs & Sweet Dreams!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E6 - Calm Songs & Sweet Dreams!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.
